finding_results.notes: Full constitution-compliance audit performed. Fixes applied in three categories: (1) Recurring prose formula — 'the way [noun] [verb]' simile construction appeared 8 times in the chapter, violating constitution rule 9 (>2 per chapter = tic). Reduced to 2 retained instances (lines 55 and 89) that do essential character work, plus 1 in dialogue (line 285) which is character speech. Six narrative instances reworked: lines 9, 41, 63, 133, 169, 189, 209 (x2), 225, 287, 339. (2) Continuity math error — Dan references setting up Theo's education fund 'when he was born' (Theo is 9) but then says 'four years of twenty dollars a week' and Mira confirms 'about four thousand dollars.' Corrected to 'nine years' and 'a little over nine thousand dollars' across all four references (lines 163, 165, 167, 301, 317), consistent with $20/week x 52 weeks x 9 years = ~$9,360. (3) POV drift in final paragraph — the close-third Mira POV broke into a generalized narrator register with 'the woman standing in the rain.' Rewired to stay in Mira's POV ('Not about her. Not about whether she'd open the umbrella or stand in it'). Additional tightening: removed redundant 'landed...landed' construction (line 209), tightened 'the thing Dan did when he was frustrated' periphrastic construction (line 159). All edits preserve heading contract, character voice signatures, dialogue contraction levels (Dan high, Mira moderate, Theo high), scene count (3), chapter engine (confrontation), texture mode (hot), all must-land beats, both state deltas, and boundary continuity with chapters 11 and 13. No sanitization introduced. No new continuity contradictions created — verified ages, dates, object states, spatial details, and timeline (late April) against continuity sheet.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 12 audited and revised for constitution compliance. Three categories of fixes: (1) recurring 'the way' simile construction reduced from 8 to 2 narrative instances, resolving a prose-formula tic per constitution rule 9; (2) education fund math corrected from 'four years/$4K' to 'nine years/$9K' to match the established fact that the fund was started at Theo's birth 9 years ago; (3) final-paragraph POV drift corrected to maintain close-third Mira perspective. All structural elements intact: 3-scene architecture, confrontation engine, hot texture mode, all 5 must-land beats verified present, both required state deltas achieved, boundary continuity with chapters 11 and 13 preserved. Dialogue register verified against style bible — Dan (high contraction), Mira (moderate contraction), Theo (high contraction). No sanitization, no elliptical clipping, no transcript cadence violations. No new continuity contradictions introduced.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=1, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
